data.content: Let's start building the auth system for MoltAI
I'll set up the authentication system. Let me start with the OAuth2 provider configuration...
Also need to migrate the database to Postgres 15
Got it. I'll track the database migration as a sub-thread alongside the auth work.

data.summary:
## Main Thread
Building OAuth2 authentication system for MoltAI platform

## Active Sub-threads (max 3)
1. OAuth2 provider config — Setting up Google + GitHub federation
2. Database migration — Planning Postgres 15 upgrade from 14.x

## Key State
- targetVersion: PostgreSQL 15.2
- oauthProviders: Google, GitHub
- migrationFile: /db/migrate/003_pg15.sql

## Unresolved
- Need to verify replication config for PG15
- OAuth redirect URLs not yet registered

## Summary
Started building the auth system. Set up the basic OAuth2 flow structure and identified the need for a concurrent PG15 migration. Both threads are active.

threadSnapshot.mainThread: Building OAuth2 authentication system for MoltAI platform
unresolved: Need to verify replication config for PG15
OAuth redirect URLs not yet registered

data.content: The PG15 migration is done. Focus on getting OAuth working with the redirect URLs.
Great, migration complete. I've registered the OAuth redirect URLs and am now testing the Google flow.
Google OAuth works. Let's add rate limiting to the token endpoint.

data.summary:
## Main Thread
Building OAuth2 authentication system for MoltAI platform

## Active Sub-threads (max 3)
1. OAuth2 provider config — Google flow working, GitHub pending
2. Rate limiting — Adding token endpoint rate limits

## Thread History
- Database migration: completed — Postgres 15.2 upgrade successful

## Key State
- targetVersion: PostgreSQL 15.2
- oauthProviders: Google (working), GitHub (pending)
- redirectUrl: https://auth.moltai.com/callback
- rateLimitTarget: /api/v1/token

## Unresolved
- GitHub OAuth redirect URL registration pending
- Rate limit thresholds not yet decided

## Summary
Database migration completed successfully. Google OAuth flow is fully working with redirect URL registered. Now adding rate limiting to the token endpoint. GitHub OAuth is next after rate limiting is in place.

threadSnapshot.mainThread: Building OAuth2 authentication system for MoltAI platform
unresolved: GitHub OAuth redirect URL registration pending
Rate limit thresholds not yet decided
